docs.name: Iridescent Foil Button
docs.description: A holographic foil CTA button with pointer-reactive hue/angle shifts, soft specular sheen, and fine grain texture. Built as a drop-in button with proper focus states, disabled support, and reduced-motion-safe scale behavior.

props.name: variant
props.description: Controls base gradient and foil intensity.

props.name: grainOpacity
props.description: Opacity for the turbulence grain overlay. Recommended range: 0.03-0.08.

props.name: hueRange
props.description: Maximum hue swing in degrees driven by pointer position.

docs.overview: IridescentFoilButton layers a dark base gradient, a conic foil sheen, and an SVG turbulence grain pass to simulate holographic foil without shaders. Pointer movement updates CSS custom properties (`--foil-angle`, `--foil-hue`, `--foil-x`, `--foil-y`) so hue and highlight position track the cursor in real time. Hover and press use spring scale feedback (`1.02` on hover, `0.98` on tap), while reduced-motion users keep the foil effect but skip motion scaling. The component extends native motion button props, so `type`, `disabled`, `onClick`, and form behavior work as expected.

scenarios.title: Primary hero CTA
scenarios.description: Use `vivid` variant for high-attention call-to-action buttons in hero sections.

scenarios.title: Subtle dashboard action
scenarios.description: Use `subtle` for dense interfaces where you want foil personality without overwhelming nearby controls.

scenarios.title: Disabled and form-safe button
scenarios.description: Works as a drop-in `<button>` with disabled behavior and native `type` forwarding.
